header.name: Jonathan Irhodia
header.bio: Software engineer with a passion for building resilient systems, clean APIs, and great developer experiences. Specialised in Rust, TypeScript, and cloud-native architectures.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Designing and shipping cloud-worker systems in Rust. Building internal tooling, improving DX across the stack, and leading architecture decisions for high-throughput APIs.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Built production-grade TypeScript services and React frontends. Introduced component libraries that reduced duplication across three product teams.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained PHP/Laravel backends and Vue frontends for SaaS clients. Shipped features end-to-end across 10+ products.

skills.items: Cloudflare Workers · Docker · PostgreSQL · Redis · GitHub Actions
API design · System design · DX tooling · Open source
